tagline: Your Trusted Pool Services Company in Atwater, Merced, Turlock and Surrounding Areas

hero.headline:
30 Years of Expertise In Your
Backyard
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your escape, not your weekend chore. Best Pro Pool has kept Central Valley families swimming in crystal-clear water since 2009. Let our certified team handle everything so you can just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Cleaning to Construction
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to building your dream pool, Best Pro Pool handles it all. One team, one phone call, total peace of mind.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Chemical testing and balancing, skimmer and pump basket cleaning, filter maintenance, wall brushing, and netting. Your pool stays swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. Trained on Pentair, Jandy, Zodiac, and Waterway — most repairs done same visit.

cards.title: One-Time Pool Clean-Up
cards.description: Neglected or green pool? We bring it back to pristine condition fast. Perfect for new homeowners, seasonal openings, or post-storm recovery.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing that keeps water safe, sparkling, and gentle on skin. No red eyes, no irritation — just perfect water every time.

cards.title: Pool & Backyard Remodeling
cards.description: Replastering, tile work, coping replacement, deck resurfacing, and complete backyard renovations. Transform your outdoor space into something extraordinary.

cards.title: New Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed pools built for your backyard, lifestyle, and budget. Full project management from permits to final inspection and first splash.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Sparkling Pool

steps.title: Request Your Free Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We provide an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments required.

steps.title: We Handle Everything
steps.description: Our certified technicians arrive on schedule and take care of it all — cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks. You get photo documentation after every visit.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready year-round. If anything is not right, we come back and fix it at no extra charge. That is the Best Pro Pool promise.

about.label: Why Central Valley Trusts Us
about.headline: Locally Owned, Family Operated — Since 2009
about.description: Best Pro Pool was founded right here in Atwater by Benny Friesen and Andrew Jantz, two guys who believe pool care should be honest, reliable, and personal. With over 30 years of combined experience and a team of dedicated technicians, we have built our reputation one sparkling pool at a time. We are licensed, insured, and proud to serve the communities we call home.

features.title: Photo Reports Every Visit
features.description: Every service visit includes photo documentation so you always know exactly what was done and the condition of your pool.

features.title: Transparent Service Tiers
features.description: Choose between our Chemical Plus and Platinum plans. Clear pricing, no hidden fees, and the flexibility to upgrade or change anytime.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. Our 4.9-star rating on 107+ reviews speaks for itself.

pricing.headline: Clear Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Chemical Plus or Platinum — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and make it right at no extra cost. No fine print, no runaround. We have maintained a 4.9-star rating across 107+ reviews because we treat every pool like it is our own. Your satisfaction is not just a promise — it is how we have built our business for 17 years.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in Atwater, Merced, and Turlock are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Call us and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything. You will receive photo documentation after every visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Chemical Plus and Platinum?
faqs.answer: Chemical Plus covers weekly chemical testing, balancing, and basket cleaning. Platinum adds full-service brushing, vacuuming, filter cleaning, and equipment checks. Both plans include photo reports after every visit.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you work on?
faqs.answer: We are trained and certified on all major brands including Pentair, Jandy, Zodiac, and Waterway. As a Pentair Authorized Dealer, we also offer competitive pricing on new equipment and upgrades.

faqs.question: Do you build new pools?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are a licensed pool contractor (CA #871411) and handle everything from custom pool design and permitting to construction and final inspection. Contact us for a free design consultation.

testimonials.name: Linda T.
testimonials.text: Very good service techs and knowledgeable staff! Best Pro Pools are the very best! They keep our pool looking amazing week after week.

testimonials.name: Yvonne T.
testimonials.text: Always on time, always doing a great job and always letting us know if there are any issues with our equipment. Could not ask for better service.

testimonials.name: Elizabeth W.
testimonials.text: Reliable service with great photo documentation of every visit. I always know exactly what was done and the condition of my pool. Highly recommend Best Pro Pool.
